summary: #48834 is already closed and should not receive any closure action. #83458 is the only open hydrated candidate and should become the live canonical for the narrower Feishu ACP topic conversation-binding work, but it is not merge-ready because required checks include Real behavior proof failure and other failed CI.

actions.reason: Already closed; preserve as historical context for the Feishu ACP/session-binding family, but do not attempt closure, merge, or replacement in plan mode.
Use #83458 as the live canonical for the remaining narrow ACP topic-binding subcluster. Keep it open for maintainer validation instead of closing it as a duplicate of the closed, broader #48834.
